extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The initial local maximum occurs early (within the first 10–15% of the series) and reaches at least a high value (around 0.7–0.8 of the scale).  
R2: After this early peak, the series shows a long, relatively smooth decline to a clear minimum near the middle of the series (around 30–40% of length).  
R3: From that mid-series minimum, the values rise again and then fluctuate in a relatively high, mildly wavy plateau for the remaining duration.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series also has an early strong peak (within the first 10–15% of the series), comparable in height to Class 0 (around 0.7–0.8 of the scale).  
R2: After the early peak, the series declines but then forms a broad, smooth “hill” during the middle part (roughly 40–60% of the series), where values remain moderately high and relatively flat.  
R3: Following this mid-series hill, the series gradually decreases or flattens to a lower, more stable level without rising back into a high plateau as prominently as in Class 0.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts with a moderate rise, reaching its global maximum very early (within the first ~10% of time).
R2: After this early peak, the series shows a long, mostly monotonic decline to a clear minimum in the middle of the time span.
R3: In the last third, the series recovers with a smooth, gradual upward trend and ends noticeably higher than its mid-series minimum.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts with a sharper and higher early spike than class 0, forming its global maximum right at the beginning.
R2: Following this spike, it declines into a broad, relatively flat trough with small fluctuations (less pronounced mid-series minimum than class 0).
R3: In the last third, the series shows a modest rise and then flattens or slightly oscillates, ending at a level similar to or slightly above the mid-series values but without a strong late uptrend.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial peak, the signal drops steadily to a clear minimum around the mid‑segment, then rises again in the second half.
R2: The lowest value of the series occurs roughly in the middle of the time axis, not near the start or the end.
R3: The final segment (last third) shows an upward or flat trend compared with the middle minimum.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the initial peak, the signal also drops, but its lowest value is reached earlier, in the first third of the time axis.
R2: From this early minimum, the signal rises to a plateau in the middle of the series and then gently declines or stays flat.
R3: The final segment (last third) remains at or below the middle plateau and does not show a clear recovery above it.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The first local maximum occurs very early and reaches a moderate value (around 0.7–0.75).
R2: After this peak, the series decreases for quite a long segment to a low valley near 0.1.
R3: From that low valley, the series rises again toward the end to a middle level (around 0.45–0.5).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The first local maximum occurs very early and reaches a slightly higher value (around 0.8–0.85).
R2: After this peak, the series decreases to a valley that stays above the very low level of class 0 (bottoms around 0.15–0.2, not near 0.1).
R3: From that valley, the series rises again but finishes near a somewhat lower level than class 0 (around 0.4) and without as pronounced a late increase.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After an initial peak, the signal decreases steadily until roughly one‑third of the series length, staying mostly below 0.4 and often reaching around 0.1–0.2.  
R2: From about one‑third to two‑thirds of the series, the signal rises strongly from that low region up to about 0.45–0.55.  
R3: In the final third, the signal remains in a mid‑high band around 0.45–0.55 with small oscillations but without a clear downward trend.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After an initial peak, the signal decreases steadily until roughly one‑third of the series length, similar to class 0, but the descent ends slightly higher (typically not below about 0.15–0.2).  
R2: From about one‑third to just over half of the series, the signal rises to a plateau that is slightly higher than in class 0 (around 0.5–0.6).  
R3: In the remaining part of the series, the signal gradually declines from that plateau, ending clearly lower than its mid‑segment maximum instead of staying flat.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the sharp initial peak, the series drops to a clear minimum before time ≈ 40 and then rises steadily into the second half.  
R2: The lowest value before time ≈ 40 is distinctly lower than any value after time ≈ 50.  
R3: In the last third of the series, values stay mostly in the mid–high range with small fluctuations around a rising trend.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the sharp initial peak, the series again drops to a minimum before time ≈ 40 and rises, but the rise flattens into a broad plateau rather than continuing to climb.  
R2: The values between time ≈ 40 and 70 remain roughly stable (plateau) and do not clearly exceed the late values after time ≈ 70.  
R3: In the final third, the series slightly declines or stays flat at a moderate level instead of ending on a distinctly higher level than the mid-section.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After an initial local maximum, the series decreases steadily for a relatively long segment and reaches its global minimum around the middle of the sequence.  
R2: From that middle minimum, the series rises for a long segment and forms a broad, noisy plateau at a medium–high level (roughly 0.4–0.5).  
R3: In the last part of the sequence, values stay near that plateau level with only small fluctuations and without a clear downward trend.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After an initial local maximum, the series decreases steadily and reaches its global minimum clearly before the temporal midpoint of the sequence.  
R2: From this early minimum, the series rises and quickly reaches a medium–high level, then gently declines or flattens through the middle of the sequence.  
R3: In the last part of the sequence, values remain mostly flat at a medium level (roughly 0.35–0.45), without a pronounced rising trend.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After an early peak, the series drops steadily to a pronounced minimum around the middle, then rises again toward the end (clear “V” shape over the full length).  
R2: The minimum in the middle section is relatively low (around 0.1–0.2), clearly below both the start and the end levels.  
R3: The value toward the end recovers to a mid-range level (around 0.4–0.5) but does not exceed the very first peak.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After an early peak, the series also declines toward the middle but the bottom is shallower (minimum stays above roughly 0.15–0.2, not as deep a “V”).  
R2: The end of the series remains lower than or roughly equal to the middle plateau (no strong recovery after the middle rise).  
R3: The middle section contains a relatively broad, smoother plateau (around 0.45–0.55) followed by a mild downward trend rather than a renewed climb.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The very first peak is moderate (around 0.6–0.7) and occurs early, within the first 10% of the series.  
R2: After this first peak the series descends steadily to a low valley (around 0.1–0.2) roughly by the first third of the series.  
R3: From that valley the series rises and then stays in a mid‑range plateau (around 0.4–0.5) with small wiggles, without returning to the initial peak height.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The very first peak is higher (around 0.8 or above) and occurs very early, within the first 5–8% of the series.  
R2: After this high peak the series drops quickly to a lower mid‑level (around 0.3–0.4), not all the way down to the deep valley yet.  
R3: Only after this partial drop does the series continue downward to a deeper valley (around 0.1–0.2) before rising again to a mid‑range plateau.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial peak, the series drops to a low point that is relatively shallow (the minimum value stays clearly above 0.1).
R2: From this low point up to around the middle of the series, the rise is moderate rather than very steep.
R3: In the last third of the series, the values fluctuate around a relatively high plateau and do not show a clear downward trend.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the initial peak, the series drops to a noticeably deeper minimum (the minimum value goes very close to 0.1).
R2: From this deep minimum to the middle of the series, the rise is steeper and more rapid.
R3: In the last third of the series, the values form a lower, gently decreasing plateau rather than staying flat or rising.
